title: NAMES — kid-name shortlist + birth-condition wishlist (2023)
html:
NAMES — kid-name shortlist + birth-condition wishlist (2023)

Source: 2023-07-23 Apple Note (modified through 2026-03 — actively edited for 2.5 years). Future-kid name brainstorm + a list of weird birth-conditions Yahir wants for his kids.

TL;DR

  • Active 2.5-year doc — created 2023-07-23, last modified 2026-03-15, meaning Yahir keeps revisiting his kid-name list. Real intent, not a one-time brainstorm.
  • Girl candidates: Jrei, Jordana, Georgina, Luci, Sailor, Gina, Jana, Zora, Avari.
  • Boy candidates: Giovanni, Jovani, Dorian, Napoleone, Marvin, Gilbert, Jon___.
  • Birth-condition wishlist (the weirder layer): "chose own name, born in random ass island/country, born on a boat, godfather is a random celeb or stranger, name have the ü." Yahir wants his kids to start with origin-mythos.
  • Pattern: Yahir's voice extends to engineering origin stories for descendants. Same forward-bending energy as mom house by the river but generationally projected.

Connections

  • mom house by the river
  • yahir family
  • lineage as fate
  • non negotiables for traveling — name-have-the-ü is travel-romanticism leaking into family
  • 2022 09 04 never been in love vietnamese fucked — earlier baseline (no love yet)

related.label: Never been in love + Vietnamese family fuck-over premonition (2022)
